candidate_definitions.text: Universal SEO skill for Claude Code. 19 sub-skills, 12 subagents, 3 extensions (DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Banana). Technical SEO, E-E-A-T, schema, GEO/AEO, backlinks, local SEO, maps intelligence, Google APIs, and PDF/Excel reporting.
